params.pqcSignature: The PQC signature proving the fallback

params.sessionKeyHash: Hash of the QKD-derived session key

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

closeQKDSession(bytes32).notice: Close a QKD session (when compromised or expired)

establishPQCFallbackSession(bytes32,addr.notice: Establish PQC Fallback session between two validators (Apple ML-KEM)

establishQKDSession(bytes32,address,addr.notice: Establish QKD session between two validators

getActiveSession(address,address).notice: Get active session between two validators

hasActiveQKD(address).notice: Check if validator has any active QKD session

registerValidator(address,uint8).notice: Register a new validator with QKD tier capability
